input.title: ArrowUp moves selection to beginning of previous sibling
input.body:
## Current Behavior

Hitting `ArrowUp` moves the selection to the beginning of the previous thought.

## Expected Behavior
Hitting ArrowUp should move the selection to the last line of the previous thought, directly up. This mimics the default browser behavior when hitting `ArrowUp` within a multi-line thought (although this is currently broken. See: #550).

e.g.

```
- This is a thought that
  is now wrapping.
- Test|
```

Hitting `ArrowUp` should result in:

```
- This is a thought that
  is n|ow wrapping.
- Test
```
